proposed_domain: anglerfish-Photobacterium symbiosis (esca-housed luminous bacterium acquired from environment; host modulates emission via oxygen flow; symbiont is genome-reduced and host-locked)

closest_prior_match.verdict: CLOSE — lichen is obligate dual-organism nutrient exchange; anglerfish is host-controlled environment-acquired emission. Different mechanism class (nutrient swap vs gated-emission auxiliary).

decision: ACCEPT-WITH-CAVEAT — symbiosis overlap with lichen noted but mechanism class differs.
